```{r somatic-variants-table}
if (is.null(variants) || nrow(variants) == 0) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nNo somatic variants detected in this sample.\n:::\n")
} else {
  # Prepare the display table
  # Sort by clinical significance: Pathogenic > Likely Pathogenic > VUS > Benign
  pathogenicity_order <- c(
    "Pathogenic", "Likely_pathogenic", "Likely pathogenic",
    "Uncertain_significance", "Uncertain significance", "VUS",
    "Likely_benign", "Likely benign",
    "Benign",
    NA_character_
  )

  variants_display <- variants |>
    mutate(
      pathogenicity_rank = match(
        coalesce(pathogenicity, clinvar_significance, ""),
        pathogenicity_order,
        nomatch = 99
      ),
      vaf_pct = if ("vaf" %in% names(variants)) round(vaf * 100, 1) else NA_real_
    ) |>
    arrange(pathogenicity_rank, desc(vaf_pct)) |>
    select(
      Gene         = any_of(c("gene", "gene_symbol", "SYMBOL")),
      `HGVS Protein` = any_of(c("hgvsp", "hgvs_protein", "HGVSp_Short")),
      `HGVS Coding`  = any_of(c("hgvsc", "hgvs_coding", "HGVSc")),
      `VAF (%)`    = any_of(c("vaf_pct")),
      Consequence  = any_of(c("consequence", "Consequence")),
      Impact       = any_of(c("impact", "IMPACT")),
      ClinVar      = any_of(c("clinvar_significance", "clinvar", "CLIN_SIG")),
      COSMIC       = any_of(c("cosmic_id", "cosmic", "COSMIC_ID")),
      Pathogenicity = any_of(c("pathogenicity", "classification"))
    )

  # Determine which rows are pathogenic for highlighting
  pathogenic_rows <- which(
    grepl("pathogenic", tolower(variants_display$Pathogenicity %||% ""), fixed = FALSE) &
    !grepl("benign", tolower(variants_display$Pathogenicity %||% ""), fixed = FALSE)
  )

  gt_table <- variants_display |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Somatic Variants Detected**"),
      subtitle = md(glue("*{nrow(variants_display)} variant(s) identified*"))
    ) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = any_of(c("VAF (%)", "Impact"))) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = px(12),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
      table.border.top.width = px(3),
      data_row.padding = px(5)
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fafafa"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(variants_display), by = 2))
    )

  # Highlight pathogenic variants
  if (length(pathogenic_rows) > 0) {
    gt_table <- gt_table |>
      tab_style(
        style = list(
          cell_fill(color = "#ffebee"),
          cell_text(weight = "bold")
        ),
        locations = cells_body(rows = pathogenic_rows)
      )
  }

  gt_table
}
```
